evals.prompt: What are people saying about Claude Code on Reddit and Twitter in the last 30 days?
evals.expected_output: A structured social listening report with sentiment, key threads, and sources
expectations: Searches Reddit using site:reddit.com with a date filter
Provides a sentiment rating or assessment
Includes links to specific threads or posts found
Organizes findings into the structured report format (trending themes, key voices, etc.)

evals.prompt: Check Reddit for what people are saying about AI consulting trends in the last 30 days.
evals.expected_output: A social listening report focused on Reddit discussion of AI consulting
expectations: Uses brave_web_search or web search with site:reddit.com filter
Identifies relevant subreddits discussing the topic
Summarizes sentiment and key discussion themes
